Timeline_Section.title:
My
Timeline
Timeline_Section.subtitle: A journey through the apps and projects that shaped my professional path over the years.
Timeline_Section.hint: Click any icon to see the details.
Timeline_Section.pacific_description: Warehouse and logistics lead at Comedores Industriales del Pacífico. Inventory management, distribution routes and operational coordination across the supply chain.
Timeline_Section.enviaflores_android_description: Android intern contributing to the floral e-commerce mobile app. Feature work in Kotlin, REST API integration and MVVM architecture.
Timeline_Section.enviaflores_ios_description: First iOS developer role, contributing to EnviaFlores' native app. Swift, UIKit/SwiftUI and a focus on a smooth end-user experience.
Timeline_Section.viva_description: Mobile Software Engineer at Viva Aerobus, building the airline's official app with a cross-platform team. Shipping critical booking, check-in and travel-experience features.
Timeline_Section.first_site_description: The first lines of HTML and CSS: a static site experimenting with structure, semantics and basic styling. Where it all began.
Timeline_Section.python_scripts_description: Day-to-day automations and small scripts: file manipulation, light scraping and data-structure exercises. First contact with a dynamic language.
Timeline_Section.js_game_description: A mini browser game built with vanilla JS, HTML canvas and jQuery for interactions. First taste of game logic and animation loops.
Timeline_Section.php_crud_description: Classic CRUD application with PHP and MySQL — login, sessions, dashboard. An exploration of the traditional backend stack that still powers half the web.
Timeline_Section.react_experiments_description: First components, hooks and lightweight SPAs in React. This is where the spark for modern front-end and declarative composition began.
Timeline_Section.android_side_app_description: Native Android side-project: Kotlin, MVVM architecture and an exploration of Jetpack Compose. A sandbox for testing ideas without fear of breaking anything.
Timeline_Section.cross_platform_description: Serious exploration of Flutter and Kotlin Multiplatform: one codebase running on iOS and Android, comparing the trade-offs of each approach.
Timeline_Section.portfolio_description: This very site. Built with Next.js 16 (App Router, Turbopack), React 19, TypeScript and Tailwind CSS, with Framer Motion animations and internationalization via next-intl (ES/EN). Deployed on my own server behind a Caddy reverse proxy and managed as a systemd service. Architecture focused on independent sections so it scales cleanly as new projects land here.

About_Me_Section.description: Hi, I'm Michael Noguera, a software engineer passionate about creating solutions that blend design and functionality. I love mobile development and I'm always eager to learn new things.

Contact_Section.subtitle: ¿Tienes un proyecto en mente, una oportunidad laboral o simplemente quieres saludar? ¡Estoy disponible para colaborar, resolver dudas o compartir ideas!
